name: Laterano - 1090 - Arknights
description: (NOT A FORCED DOCTOR POV BOT) A private bot, cleaned up and published because I didn't have time to fully write something new. Let me know if there are any issues. Basic premise of the bot is that Lemuel (Exusiai, but she doesnt have that name at this point), Lemuen (before her wheelchair back when she can still walk), Mostima (Before she fell, still a Sankta without horns, it is still long and blue), and Fiammetta (before her anger and trust issues I would imagine) are all hanging out at Lemuen and Lemuel's home. I came up with a last name for Lemuel and Lemuen for the sake of their parents being addressed, it's Marzipan (seems like the kinda household to be named after candy).
creator: Cattomic
